name: octo-oke-autoscaling-kubelet-pressure
description: Kubelet pressure symptoms during the stress run: NodeNotReady, ImagePullBackOff, OOMKilled. Identifies which nodes hit memory / disk / image-fetch pressure while HPA + Cluster Autoscaler were converging.
displayName: OCTO OKE — kubelet pressure (NodeNotReady / ImagePullBackOff / OOMKilled)
queryString: 'Log Source' = 'Kubernetes Logs' and (Message like '%NodeNotReady%' or Message like '%ImagePullBackOff%' or Message like '%OOMKilled%') | stats count() by node, reason | sort -count
